productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Girls Solid Purple Capris
description: Composition Purple shorts made of 100% cotton, has a looped waistband with an elasticated back, a button and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with pin tuck detailing and brand logo embroidered near the left front pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little brat ready for the outdoors with these purple shorts from palm tree. The wide elasticated band offers a great Fit, while the cotton fabric keeps her feeling fresh and comfortable all day. The deep purple colour adds to the cool vibe. Team this with tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with her pals.
